name: crossloom
description: CrossLoom developer toolkit for external 3TXpert developers — MCP tools, auto-firing knowledge Skills, and a SessionStart conventions hook, distributed as one Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: crossloom
plugins.description: CrossLoom integration-platform toolkit for external 3TXpert developers: MCP server (actions), auto-firing knowledge Skills, and a SessionStart conventions hook. Requires Python + the crossloom-cli wheel.
